node.statement: SUBROUTINE 2H — Tensor Product Block Encoding: Given block encodings of A and B, construct a block encoding of A tensor B using permutations on qubit registers (Lemma 18, Corollary 3). Cost: poly(log N_max) additional gates per dimension. Used to lift 1D interpolation BEs to d dimensions via I^d_{l->l} = (I^1_{l->l})^{tensor d} (Lemma 12).
